## Bug Fixes

- Fixed installed release builds opening with no visible window because the packaged app imported `electron-updater` from the wrong ESM export shape.
- Added a defensive auto-updater resolver so update setup can never block main window creation if `electron-updater` is unavailable.
- Isolated development builds as `MDE Dev` with a separate user data path so local dev sessions no longer consume the packaged MDE single-instance lock.

## Release Automation

- Release workflow now restores annotated tag notes after `electron-builder` uploads assets, so GitHub release notes keep the complete version summary.

## Verification

- `npm run lint`
- `npm run typecheck`
- `npm run test:unit`
- `npm run test:integration`
- `npm run test:e2e`
- `npm run package`
- Launched the packaged `release/mac/MDE.app` and verified it stays running without the previous `autoDownload` crash.

## Artifacts

- macOS Apple Silicon: `MDE-1.1.1-mac-arm64.dmg`, `MDE-1.1.1-mac-arm64.zip`
- macOS Intel: `MDE-1.1.1-mac-x64.dmg`, `MDE-1.1.1-mac-x64.zip`
